name: Rodney Dangerfield
bio: Rodney Dangerfield was an American stand-up comedian and actor best known for his self-deprecating one-liners built around the catchphrase I dont get no respect. He became a fixture of late-night television through dozens of Tonight Show appearances and later opened the New York comedy club Dangerfields, which launched the careers of many younger comics.

timeline.ev: First of 17 appearances on The Ed Sullivan Show
Opens Dangerfields comedy club in New York; begins 70-plus Carson appearances
Comedy album No Respect wins the Grammy
Breakout film role as Al Czervik in Caddyshack
Stars in and co-writes Back to School
Receives a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame

accolades: Grammy Award for Best Comedy Album, No Respect (1980)
Star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame (2002)
First celebrity to own and create content for a personal website (1995)

specials.t: Rodney Dangerfield: It's Not Easy Bein' Me
